ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Insert (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Insert (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Insert a row with primary key and three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Insert (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using IF EXISTS with one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert IfExists (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using IF EXISTS with two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert IfExists (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using IF EXISTS with three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert IfExists (3 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE <Table> AS target
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0>) AS source
ON (target.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET target.<Column0> = source.<Column0>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>) VALUES (source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, source.<Column0>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using MERGE statement with one data column.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert MERGE (1 Column)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE <Table> AS target
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0>, <Value1> AS <Column1>) AS source
ON (target.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET target.<Column0> = source.<Column0>, target.<Column1> = source.<Column1>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>, <Column1>) VALUES (source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, source.<Column0>, source.<Column1>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using MERGE statement with two data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert MERGE (2 Columns)

ToolboxElements.Content:
MERGE <Table> AS target
USING (SELECT <PrimaryKeyValue> AS <PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Value0> AS <Column0>, <Value1> AS <Column1>, <Value2> AS <Column2>) AS source
ON (target.<PrimaryKeyColumn> = source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>)
WHEN MATCHED THEN
    UPDATE SET target.<Column0> = source.<Column0>, target.<Column1> = source.<Column1>, target.<Column2> = source.<Column2>
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN
    INSERT (<PrimaryKeyColumn>, <Column0>, <Column1>, <Column2>) VALUES (source.<PrimaryKeyColumn>, source.<Column0>, source.<Column1>, source.<Column2>);
ToolboxElements.Description: Upsert pattern using MERGE statement with three data columns.
ToolboxElements.Name: MSSQL Upsert MERGE (3 Columns)
